pages.text: The book in your hands. $(italic)Novus's$() own survival manual — the systems that have changed, the first few days, the things worth knowing before you spawn. You already carry it; this page is here only so the shelf is complete.$(br2)$(bold)To craft:$() a $(italic)Book$() + a $(italic)Stick$(), shapeless.
pages.title: Traveler's Companion
